title: Untitled document (1).pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is an all-in-one customer retention and loyalty platform designed primarily for growing e-commerce brands on Shopify.
* The software was founded in 2023 and is headquartered in Pune, India.
* It combines customer rewards, referral structures, and product reviews to boost customer lifetime value (LTV).
* It features loyalty programs including points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* It automates text, photo, and video review collection via email or SMS, syncs with Google Shopping, and generates SEO-rich snippets.
* It enables businesses to build custom referral networks to turn existing customers into brand advocates.

* Integration with Google Shopping and generation of SEO-rich snippets.  
* Creation of custom referral networks and membership tiers with exclusive perks.  
* Built-in marketing automation featuring email flows for welcome messages, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.  
* Retenzy provides over 15 pre-built storefront widgets to display loyalty incentives and review sections without custom development.
